chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4066 of 2025 Shezan Services (Pvt.) Ltd. & another Versus Cantonment Board Clifton Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 19772/25 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of CMA 16693/25 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 01.10.2025 Mr. Furqn Mushtaq, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zaheem Hyder, advocate for respondent. -.-.- 1) Petitioners have filed this application to withdrawn the petition, which is allowed and the petition is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications. Judge Judge
